note: As-built values — these mirror frontend/style.css :root. The CSS is the runtime source of truth (tokens are not loaded at runtime); keep this file in sync whenever a token value changes.

studio-green.role: Primary background — the pitch field and page base.

deep-ink.role: Deep surface — header, bench, elevated cards, toasts.

signal-lime.role: Primary action / accent. CTAs (Start match, Next, Done), live + sub-in. Muted back from the original #B8E62E. Aim for one lime element per screen.

signal-lime-press.role: Pressed state for Signal Lime actions.

on-accent.role: Text / icons on Signal Lime — lime is light, so never use white on it.

amber-phosphor.role: Warnings ONLY (under-slotted players, alerts). Never a general accent.

ghost-green.role: Lighter, lime-leaning pitch tint while Tinkering.

provisional-chalk.role: Dashed outline on movable tokens while Tinkering.

danger.role: Destructive / removal. Outside the core palette but functionally required.

coach-blue.role: In-match advisory prompts (e.g. the 'reset clock?' banner).

position.note: Functional position coding on the pitch and plan grid — a spread, toned-down tetrad (teal / purple / lime / burnt-orange). MID's lime shares the Signal-Lime hue by coach preference; its solid chips use dark text for legibility.

mid.role: Midfield — lime. Bright/light, so solid grid chips use dark text (chip-text). Shares the Signal-Lime hue by preference.

badge.note: GK-tier / DEF-restriction status badges in the squad list. Tokenised (T2.3) so colourways can re-map them; base values mirror --badge-* in :root.

colourway.note: Alternate colour themes (T2.3). Applied at runtime via :root[data-theme='<key>'] in style.css; the default (Level) needs no attribute. Persisted per-device under localStorage 'gaffer_theme'.

colourblind.role: Colourblind-safe palette (Okabe–Ito based) — maximises separation under deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia. Non-hue cues (🧤 GK, ↑/↓ subs, ⚽ goals, position labels) are preserved. Signal-Lime accent (--matchday) kept for brand recognition.

display.role: Headers, player initials, scores, data points.

timer.role: Live match timer only. Minimum 24px; falls back to Space Mono below that.

body.role: UI labels, helper text, body copy.

typography.numerals: Space Mono is tabular by design — minutes and counters align without a tabular-nums workaround.

tinkering.metaphor: Modulation, not replacement. The pitch tints one step lighter and movable tokens invert with a dashed outline — no paper, no wobble. The identity lives in the type and the pill.

surface.role: Pitch tints from Studio Green up to the lighter, lime-leaning Ghost Green while Tinkering.

token.role: Movable player tokens invert to a dark coin with chalk text and a chunky dashed Provisional-Chalk outline. GK / incoming keep their identity colour but still gain the dashed outline.
